title: buddleja corrugata subsp. corrugata
intro: Buddleja corrugata subsp. corrugata, also known as the Chilean or South American butterfly bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Buddleja corrugata subsp. corrugata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
